detail.description:
Merge! Fashion! Drama! 
From girl next door to Hollywood sensation, experience the celebrity life now!

Life in LA is tough and running back and forth from your part-time job to acting auditions to be an extra isn't all that glamorous either. However, by some miracle, you find out you're actually the long-lost daughter of Hollywood actor Peter Dake.

When you learn about your family history, your whole world is turned upside down. Well, what you thought would be a life of ease, turns out to be a
detail.recentChanges:
Update Now for Exciting New Features!
- Episode 65 Is Here! Face the rumors head-on, then stun the crowd with your designs and charm.
- The Desserts Pass is live! Complete tasks to earn points and unlock tons of sweet rewards.
- The Rhythm Fiesta kicks off May 25. The stage is waiting for you, so come join the music festival!
- The new merge event, Azure Getaway , kicks off June 2! Hit the beach with Nate for a getaway made for two!
